agent.name: Strategy Lab Agent
agent.start: cd ${directory} && bash scripts/kill-agents.sh && screen -dmS agent bash -c 'cd ${directory} && python3 api/agent.py'

vibe-agent.name: Vibe Lab Agent
vibe-agent.start: cd ${directory} && bash scripts/kill-agents.sh && screen -dmS vibe-agent bash -c 'cd ${directory} && python3 api/vibe_agent.py'

candle.name: FastAPI Server
candle.start: cd ${directory} && bash scripts/kill-agents.sh --servers && screen -dmS candle bash -c 'cd ${directory} && uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001'
